meta.title: Book the Baya Room - Farm El Baya
meta.description: Check availability and book the Baya Room at Farm El Baya in Testour. International PayPal checkout and a local booking path for guests in Tunisia.

hero.heading: Book your farm stay.
hero.subhead: There is one private room on the farm - the Baya Room. Choose how you'd like to book, then check availability and confirm your dates.
